title: Fill in the Blank - Traversing a 2D Array in C++

content.problemStatement:
Complete the missing parts in the code that initializes a **3×4 matrix** with sequential values starting from 50 and prints each element along with its row and column indices.

---

**Expected Output:**

```java
Element at [0][0] = 50
Element at [0][1] = 51
Element at [0][2] = 52
Element at [0][3] = 53
Element at [1][0] = 54
Element at [1][1] = 55
Element at [1][2] = 56
Element at [1][3] = 57
Element at [2][0] = 58
Element at [2][1] = 59
Element at [2][2] = 60
Element at [2][3] = 61
```
